business_description.nature_of_business: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas

coverages_discussed.notes: Policy Number CP-LSPH-2025-7801, effective 07/01/2025. Prior carriers include Zurich Insurance Group (2023, $423,914.72) and American International Group (2022, $447,842.42).

positives: All 8 locations are fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R
Fire alarms are hard-wired with central station monitoring
Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors
No short-term rentals (less than 1 year) permitted
No OSHA citations in the past 3 years
No policy cancellations in prior 3 years
24 years in business with 18 years under current management
EV charging stations installed on premises
concerns: No formal safety program in place
Plumbing last updated in 2015 — over 10 years ago
EV charging stations present — elevated fire/electrical risk
Swimming pools, exercise rooms, or other amenities present — potential liability exposure
LOC-006 (1400 Enclave Parkway, Houston) built in 1995 — oldest building in portfolio
Claims filed in 2022 and 2024 (1 claim each year)
Operations span multiple metropolitan areas (DFW and Houston) across TX
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 2 claims over 3 years: 1 claim in 2024 (CNA Financial, premium $414,601.77), 0 claims in 2023 (Zurich Insurance Group, premium $423,914.72), 1 claim in 2022 (American International Group, premium $447,842.42). No cancellations in any year.

extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Commercial real estate investment and property management — office, retail, and mixed-use properties across the Dallas-Fort Worth and Houston metropolitan areas. 24 years in business, 18 years with current management. 145 full-time and 28 part-time employees. Annual revenue of $67,000,000. Hours of operation: Mon-Sat 7:00 AM - 7:00 PM.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: No formal safety program. Written contracts with all subcontractors: Yes. Written contracts with indemnification required from all contractors: Yes. No OSHA citations in the past 3 years. Fire alarms hard-wired with central station monitoring. All buildings fully sprinklered per NFPA 13 or 13R. 24-hour doorperson or security on premises.
extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: 2024: 1 claim with CNA Financial (premium $414,601.77, no cancellation). 2023: 0 claims with Zurich Insurance Group (premium $423,914.72, no cancellation). 2022: 1 claim with American International Group (premium $447,842.42, no cancellation).
